message.content:
Very thorough exploration. Find all *_regime.sh files under Tools/rbk/ and Tools/buk/. For each one, identify:
1. The buv_* enrollment function calls (e.g., buv_enroll_required, buv_enroll_optional, etc.)
2. The variable names being enrolled
3. Which regime type it belongs to (rbrr, rbra, rbrn, rbrp, rbrv, rbro, etc.)

Also find the buv_* enrollment function definitions in Tools/buk/buv_validation.sh to understand the patterns.

Report the complete inventory of enrolled regime variables per regime type.

content.text: I'll conduct a thorough exploration to find all regime files and inventory their enrollment patterns.

    17→#
    18→# Bash Validation Utility Library
    19→# Compatible with Bash 3.2 (e.g., macOS default shell)
    20→
    21→# Multiple inclusion guard
    22→test -z "${ZBUV_INCLUDED:-}" || return 0
    23→ZBUV_INCLUDED=1
    24→
    25→# Literal constants — check capture output protocol markers
    26→BUV_check_gated="gated"
    27→BUV_check_fail="fail:"
    28→
    29→# Source the console utility library
    30→ZBUV_SCRIPT_DIR="${BASH_SOURCE[0]%/*}"
    31→source "${ZBUV_SCRIPT_DIR}/buc_command.sh"
    32→
    33→buv_file_exists() {
    34→  local z_filepath="${1:-}"
    35→  test -f "${z_filepath}" || buc_die "Required file not found: ${z_filepath}"
    36→}
    37→
    38→buv_dir_exists() {
    39→  local z_dirpath="${1:-}"
    40→  test -d "${z_dirpath}" || buc_die "Required directory not found: ${z_dirpath}"
    41→}
    42→
    43→buv_dir_empty() {
    44→  local z_dirpath="${1:-}"
    45→  test -d "${z_dirpath}" || buc_die "Required directory not found: ${z_dirpath}"
    46→  local z_check_file
    47→  z_check_file=$(mktemp)
    48→  find "${z_dirpath}" -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -print -quit > "${z_check_file}"
    49→  test ! -s "${z_check_file}" || { rm -f "${z_check_file}"; buc_die "Directory must be empty: ${z_dirpath}"; }
    50→  rm -f "${z_check_file}"
    51→}
    52→
    53→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    54→# Enrollment infrastructure
    55→# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    56→
    57→zbuv_kindle() {
    58→  test -z "${ZBUV_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module buv already kindled"
    59→
    60→  # Enrollment rolls (9 parallel arrays)
    61→  z_buv_scope_roll=()
    62→  z_buv_varname_roll=()
    63→  z_buv_type_roll=()
    64→  z_buv_gate_var_roll=()
    65→  z_buv_gate_val_roll=()
    66→  z_buv_p1_roll=()
    67→  z_buv_p2_roll=()
    68→  z_buv_group_roll=()
    69→  z_buv_desc_roll=()
    70→
    71→  # Group registry rolls (4 parallel arrays, foreign-keyed by group title)
    72→  z_buv_grp_scope_roll=()
    73→  z_buv_grp_title_roll=()
    74→  z_buv_grp_gate_var_roll=()
    75→  z_buv_grp_gate_val_roll=()
    76→
    77→  # Mutable kindle state: regime context (set by buv_regime_enroll / buv_group_enroll / buv_gate_enroll)
    78→  z_buv_current_scope=""
    79→  z_buv_current_group=""
    80→  z_buv_current_group_idx=-1
    81→  z_buv_current_gate_var=""
    82→  z_buv_current_gate_val=""
    83→
    84→  readonly ZBUV_KINDLED=1
    85→}
    86→
    87→zbuv_sentinel() {
    88→  test "${ZBUV_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module buv not kindled - call zbuv_kindle first"
    89→}
    90→
    91→# Test support: reset enrollment state without re-kindling
    92→zbuv_reset_enrollment() {
    93→  zbuv_sentinel
    94→
    95→  # Clear enrollment rolls
    96→  z_buv_scope_roll=()
    97→  z_buv_varname_roll=()
    98→  z_buv_type_roll=()
    99→  z_buv_gate_var_roll=()
   100→  z_buv_gate_val_roll=()
   101→  z_buv_p1_roll=()
   102→  z_buv_p2_roll=()
   103→  z_buv_group_roll=()
   104→  z_buv_desc_roll=()
   105→
   106→  # Clear group registry rolls
   107→  z_buv_grp_scope_roll=()
   108→  z_buv_grp_title_roll=()
   109→  z_buv_grp_gate_var_roll=()
   110→  z_buv_grp_gate_val_roll=()
   111→
   112→  # Reset regime context state
   113→  z_buv_current_scope=""
   114→  z_buv_current_group=""
   115→  z_buv_current_group_idx=-1
   116→  z_buv_current_gate_var=""
   117→  z_buv_current_gate_val=""
   118→}
   119→
   120→# Regime context setters — called during kindle to establish enrollment scope
   121→
   122→# buv_regime_enroll SCOPE — set current enrollment scope
   123→# Validates that SCOPE is non-empty. All subsequent enroll calls use this scope
   124→# until another buv_regime_enroll is called.
   125→buv_regime_enroll() {
   126→  zbuv_sentinel
   127→
   128→  local z_scope="${1:-}"
   129→  test -n "${z_scope}" || buc_die "buv_regime_enroll: scope required"
   130→  z_buv_current_scope="${z_scope}"
   131→  z_buv_current_group=""
   132→  z_buv_current_group_idx=-1
   133→  z_buv_current_gate_var=""
   134→  z_buv_current_gate_val=""
   135→}
   136→
   137→# buv_group_enroll TITLE — set current group context
   138→# Creates a group registry entry. All subsequent enroll calls are tagged with
   139→# this group title until the next buv_group_enroll call.
   140→# Resets gate context — use buv_gate_enroll after this to gate items.
   141→buv_group_enroll() {
   142→  zbuv_sentinel
   143→
   144→  test -n "${z_buv_current_scope}" || buc_die "buv_group_enroll: call buv_regime_enroll first"
   145→
   146→  local z_title="${1:-}"
   147→  test -n "${z_title}" || buc_die "buv_group_enroll: title required"
   148→
   149→  z_buv_grp_scope_roll+=("${z_buv_current_scope}")
   150→  z_buv_grp_title_roll+=("${z_title}")
   151→  z_buv_grp_gate_var_roll+=("")
   152→  z_buv_grp_gate_val_roll+=("")
   153→
   154→  z_buv_current_group="${z_title}"
   155→  z_buv_current_group_idx=$(( ${#z_buv_grp_scope_roll[@]} - 1 ))
   156→  z_buv_current_gate_var=""
   157→  z_buv_current_gate_val=""
   158→}
   159→
   160→# buv_gate_enroll GATE_VAR GATE_VAL — set gate context within current group
   161→# All subsequent variable enrolls in this group are gated by this condition.
   162→# Also registers the gate on the current group for render section headers.
   163→buv_gate_enroll() {
   164→  zbuv_sentinel
   165→
   166→  test -n "${z_buv_current_group}" || buc_die "buv_gate_enroll: call buv_group_enroll first"
   167→
   168→  local z_gate_var="${1:-}"
   169→  local z_gate_val="${2:-}"
   170→  test -n "${z_gate_var}" || buc_die "buv_gate_enroll: gate variable required"
   171→  test -n "${z_gate_val}" || buc_die "buv_gate_enroll: gate value required"
   172→
   173→  z_buv_current_gate_var="${z_gate_var}"
   174→  z_buv_current_gate_val="${z_gate_val}"
   175→
   176→  z_buv_grp_gate_var_roll[z_buv_current_group_idx]="${z_gate_var}"
   177→  z_buv_grp_gate_val_roll[z_buv_current_group_idx]="${z_gate_val}"
   178→}
   179→
   180→# Internal enrollment helper — all public enroll functions delegate here
   181→# Usage: zbuv_enroll VARNAME TYPE P1 P2 DESC
   182→# Gate context inherited from buv_gate_enroll; group from buv_group_enroll.
   183→zbuv_enroll() {
   184→  zbuv_sentinel
   185→
   186→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   187→  local z_type="${2:-}"
   188→  local z_p1="${3:-}"
   189→  local z_p2="${4:-}"
   190→  local z_desc="${5:-}"
   191→
   192→  test -n "${z_buv_current_scope}" || buc_die "zbuv_enroll: call buv_regime_enroll first"
   193→  echo "${z_varname}" | grep -qE '^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$' || buc_die "zbuv_enroll: invalid variable name: '${z_varname}'"
   194→
   195→  z_buv_scope_roll+=("${z_buv_current_scope}")
   196→  z_buv_varname_roll+=("${z_varname}")
   197→  z_buv_type_roll+=("${z_type}")
   198→  z_buv_gate_var_roll+=("${z_buv_current_gate_var}")
   199→  z_buv_gate_val_roll+=("${z_buv_current_gate_val}")
   200→  z_buv_p1_roll+=("${z_p1}")
   201→  z_buv_p2_roll+=("${z_p2}")
   202→  z_buv_group_roll+=("${z_buv_current_group}")
   203→  z_buv_desc_roll+=("${z_desc}")
   204→}
   205→
   206→# Public enrollment functions — scalar types
   207→#
   208→# Signature: buv_TYPE_enroll VARNAME P1 P2 "description"
   209→# Scope from buv_regime_enroll; group from buv_group_enroll; gate from buv_gate_enroll.
   210→
   211→buv_string_enroll() {
   212→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   213→  local z_p1="${2:-}"
   214→  local z_p2="${3:-}"
   215→  local z_desc="${4:-}"
   216→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "string" "${z_p1}" "${z_p2}" "${z_desc}"
   217→}
   218→
   219→buv_xname_enroll() {
   220→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   221→  local z_p1="${2:-}"
   222→  local z_p2="${3:-}"
   223→  local z_desc="${4:-}"
   224→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "xname" "${z_p1}" "${z_p2}" "${z_desc}"
   225→}
   226→
   227→buv_gname_enroll() {
   228→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   229→  local z_p1="${2:-}"
   230→  local z_p2="${3:-}"
   231→  local z_desc="${4:-}"
   232→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "gname" "${z_p1}" "${z_p2}" "${z_desc}"
   233→}
   234→
   235→buv_fqin_enroll() {
   236→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   237→  local z_p1="${2:-}"
   238→  local z_p2="${3:-}"
   239→  local z_desc="${4:-}"
   240→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "fqin" "${z_p1}" "${z_p2}" "${z_desc}"
   241→}
   242→
   243→buv_bool_enroll() {
   244→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   245→  local z_desc="${2:-}"
   246→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "bool" "" "" "${z_desc}"
   247→}
   248→
   249→buv_enum_enroll() {
   250→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   251→  local z_desc="${2:-}"
   252→  shift 2
   253→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "enum" "$*" "" "${z_desc}"
   254→}
   255→
   256→buv_decimal_enroll() {
   257→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   258→  local z_p1="${2:-}"
   259→  local z_p2="${3:-}"
   260→  local z_desc="${4:-}"
   261→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "decimal" "${z_p1}" "${z_p2}" "${z_desc}"
   262→}
   263→
   264→buv_odref_enroll() {
   265→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   266→  local z_desc="${2:-}"
   267→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "odref" "" "" "${z_desc}"
   268→}
   269→
   270→buv_ipv4_enroll() {
   271→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   272→  local z_desc="${2:-}"
   273→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "ipv4" "" "" "${z_desc}"
   274→}
   275→
   276→buv_port_enroll() {
   277→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   278→  local z_desc="${2:-}"
   279→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "port" "" "" "${z_desc}"
   280→}
   281→
   282→# Public enrollment functions — list types
   283→
   284→buv_list_string_enroll() {
   285→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   286→  local z_p1="${2:-}"
   287→  local z_p2="${3:-}"
   288→  local z_desc="${4:-}"
   289→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "list_string" "${z_p1}" "${z_p2}" "${z_desc}"
   290→}
   291→
   292→buv_list_ipv4_enroll() {
   293→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   294→  local z_desc="${2:-}"
   295→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "list_ipv4" "" "" "${z_desc}"
   296→}
   297→
   298→buv_list_gname_enroll() {
   299→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   300→  local z_p1="${2:-}"
   301→  local z_p2="${3:-}"
   302→  local z_desc="${4:-}"
   303→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "list_gname" "${z_p1}" "${z_p2}" "${z_desc}"
   304→}
   305→
   306→buv_list_cidr_enroll() {
   307→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   308→  local z_desc="${2:-}"
   309→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "list_cidr" "" "" "${z_desc}"
   310→}
   311→
   312→buv_list_domain_enroll() {
   313→  local z_varname="${1:-}"
   314→  local z_desc="${2:-}"
   315→  zbuv_enroll "${z_varname}" "list_domain" "" "" "${z_desc}"
   316→}
   317→
   318→# Internal check capture — validates a single enrolled variable by roll index.
   319→# Returns error detail on stdout (empty = pass).
   320→# Echo "${BUV_check_gated}" when gate doesn't match (caller decides skip behavior).
   321→# Echo "${BUV_check_fail}<detail>" on validation failure.
   322→zbuv_check_capture() {
   323→  zbuv_sentinel
   324→
   325→  local z_idx="${1:-}"
   326→  local z_varname="${z_buv_varname_roll[$z_idx]}"
   327→  local z_type="${z_buv_type_roll[$z_idx]}"
   328→  local z_gate_var="${z_buv_gate_var_roll[$z_idx]}"
   329→  local z_gate_val="${z_buv_gate_val_roll[$z_idx]}"
   330→  local z_p1="${z_buv_p1_roll[$z_idx]}"
   331→  local z_p2="${z_buv_p2_roll[$z_idx]}"
   332→
   333→  # Gating check — if gated and gate doesn't match, skip (pass)
   334→  if test -n "${z_gate_var}"; then
   335→    local z_gate_actual="${!z_gate_var:-}"
   336→    if test "${z_gate_actual}" != "${z_gate_val}"; then
   337→      echo "${BUV_check_gated}"
   338→      return 0
   339→    fi
   340→  fi
   341→
   342→  # Unset detection — distinguish "not set" from "set but empty"
   343→  if test -z "${!z_varname+x}"; then
   344→    case "${z_type}" in
   345→      string|gname)
   346→        if test "${z_p1}" = "0"; then return 0; fi ;;
   347→      list_string|list_ipv4|list_gname|list_cidr|list_domain)
   348→        return 0 ;;
   349→    esac
   350→    echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} is not set (missing from .env?)"
   351→    return 0
   352→  fi
   353→
   354→  local z_val="${!z_varname:-}"
   355→
   356→  case "${z_type}" in
   357→
   358→    string)
   359→      if test "${z_p1}" = "0" && test -z "${z_val}"; then
   360→        return 0
   361→      fi
   362→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   363→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   364→        return 0
   365→      fi
   366→      if test "${#z_val}" -lt "${z_p1}"; then
   367→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be at least ${z_p1} chars, got '${z_val}' (${#z_val})"
   368→        return 0
   369→      fi
   370→      if test "${#z_val}" -gt "${z_p2}"; then
   371→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be no more than ${z_p2} chars, got '${z_val}' (${#z_val})"
   372→        return 0
   373→      fi
   374→      ;;
   375→
   376→    xname)
   377→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   378→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   379→        return 0
   380→      fi
   381→      if test "${#z_val}" -lt "${z_p1}"; then
   382→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be at least ${z_p1} chars, got '${z_val}' (${#z_val})"
   383→        return 0
   384→      fi
   385→      if test "${#z_val}" -gt "${z_p2}"; then
   386→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be no more than ${z_p2} chars, got '${z_val}' (${#z_val})"
   387→        return 0
   388→      fi
   389→      echo "${z_val}" | grep -qE '^[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_-]*$' || {
   390→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must start with letter and contain only letters, numbers, underscore, hyphen, got '${z_val}'"
   391→        return 0
   392→      }
   393→      ;;
   394→
   395→    gname)
   396→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   397→        if test "${z_p1}" -gt 0; then
   398→          echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   399→          return 0
   400→        fi
   401→        return 0
   402→      fi
   403→      if test "${#z_val}" -lt "${z_p1}"; then
   404→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be at least ${z_p1} chars, got '${z_val}' (${#z_val})"
   405→        return 0
   406→      fi
   407→      if test "${#z_val}" -gt "${z_p2}"; then
   408→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be no more than ${z_p2} chars, got '${z_val}' (${#z_val})"
   409→        return 0
   410→      fi
   411→      echo "${z_val}" | grep -qE '^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9]$' || {
   412→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must match ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9]$ (lowercase letters, digits, hyphens; start with a letter; end with letter/digit), got '${z_val}'"
   413→        return 0
   414→      }
   415→      ;;
   416→
   417→    fqin)
   418→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   419→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   420→        return 0
   421→      fi
   422→      if test "${#z_val}" -lt "${z_p1}"; then
   423→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be at least ${z_p1} chars, got '${z_val}' (${#z_val})"
   424→        return 0
   425→      fi
   426→      if test "${#z_val}" -gt "${z_p2}"; then
   427→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be no more than ${z_p2} chars, got '${z_val}' (${#z_val})"
   428→        return 0
   429→      fi
   430→      echo "${z_val}" | grep -qE '^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9:._/@-]*$' || {
   431→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must start with letter/number and contain only letters, numbers, colons, dots, underscores, hyphens, forward slashes, at-signs, got '${z_val}'"
   432→        return 0
   433→      }
   434→      ;;
   435→
   436→    bool)
   437→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   438→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   439→        return 0
   440→      fi
   441→      if test "${z_val}" != "0" && test "${z_val}" != "1"; then
   442→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be 0 or 1, got: '${z_val}'"
   443→        return 0
   444→      fi
   445→      ;;
   446→
   447→    enum)
   448→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   449→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   450→        return 0
   451→      fi
   452→      local z_choice
   453→      local z_found=0
   454→      for z_choice in ${z_p1}; do
   455→        if test "${z_val}" = "${z_choice}"; then
   456→          z_found=1
   457→          break
   458→        fi
   459→      done
   460→      if test "${z_found}" = "0"; then
   461→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must be one of: ${z_p1}, got '${z_val}'"
   462→        return 0
   463→      fi
   464→      ;;
   465→
   466→    decimal)
   467→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   468→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   469→        return 0
   470→      fi
   471→      if test "${z_val}" -ge "${z_p1}" && test "${z_val}" -le "${z_p2}"; then
   472→        return 0
   473→      fi
   474→      echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} value '${z_val}' must be between ${z_p1} and ${z_p2}"
   475→      return 0
   476→      ;;
   477→
   478→    odref)
   479→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   480→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   481→        return 0
   482→      fi
   483→      local z_re='^[a-z0-9.-]+(:[0-9]{2,5})?/([a-z0-9._-]+/)*[a-z0-9._-]+@sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}$'
   484→      echo "${z_val}" | grep -Eq "${z_re}" || {
   485→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} has invalid image reference format (require host[:port]/repo@sha256:<64hex>), got '${z_val}'"
   486→        return 0
   487→      }
   488→      ;;
   489→
   490→    ipv4)
   491→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   492→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   493→        return 0
   494→      fi
   495→      echo "${z_val}" | grep -qE '^([0-9]{1,3}\.){3}[0-9]{1,3}$' || {
   496→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} has invalid IPv4 format: '${z_val}'"
   497→        return 0
   498→      }
   499→      ;;
   500→
   501→    port)
   502→      if test -z "${z_val}"; then
   503→        echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} must not be empty"
   504→        return 0
   505→      fi
   506→      if test "${z_val}" -ge 1 && test "${z_val}" -le 65535; then
   507→        return 0
   508→      fi
   509→      echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} value '${z_val}' must be between 1 and 65535"
   510→      return 0
   511→      ;;
   512→
   513→    list_string)
   514→      local z_item
   515→      local z_item_num=0
   516→      for z_item in ${z_val}; do
   517→        z_item_num=$((z_item_num + 1))
   518→        if test "${#z_item}" -lt "${z_p1}"; then
   519→          echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} item #${z_item_num} must be at least ${z_p1} chars, got '${z_item}' (${#z_item})"
   520→          return 0
   521→        fi
   522→        if test "${#z_item}" -gt "${z_p2}"; then
   523→          echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} item #${z_item_num} must be no more than ${z_p2} chars, got '${z_item}' (${#z_item})"
   524→          return 0
   525→        fi
   526→      done
   527→      ;;
   528→
   529→    list_ipv4)
   530→      local z_item
   531→      local z_item_num=0
   532→      for z_item in ${z_val}; do
   533→        z_item_num=$((z_item_num + 1))
   534→        echo "${z_item}" | grep -qE '^([0-9]{1,3}\.){3}[0-9]{1,3}$' || {
   535→          echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} item #${z_item_num} has invalid IPv4 format: '${z_item}'"
   536→          return 0
   537→        }
   538→      done
   539→      ;;
   540→
   541→    list_gname)
   542→      local z_item
   543→      local z_item_num=0
   544→      for z_item in ${z_val}; do
   545→        z_item_num=$((z_item_num + 1))
   546→        if test "${#z_item}" -lt "${z_p1}"; then
   547→          echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} item #${z_item_num} must be at least ${z_p1} chars, got '${z_item}' (${#z_item})"
   548→          return 0
   549→        fi
   550→        if test "${#z_item}" -gt "${z_p2}"; then
   551→          echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} item #${z_item_num} must be no more than ${z_p2} chars, got '${z_item}' (${#z_item})"
   552→          return 0
   553→        fi
   554→        echo "${z_item}" | grep -qE '^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9]$' || {
   555→          echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} item #${z_item_num} must match ^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9]$, got '${z_item}'"
   556→          return 0
   557→        }
   558→      done
   559→      ;;
   560→
   561→    list_cidr)
   562→      local z_item
   563→      local z_item_num=0
   564→      for z_item in ${z_val}; do
   565→        z_item_num=$((z_item_num + 1))
   566→        echo "${z_item}" | grep -qE '^[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}\.[0-9]{1,3}/[0-9]{1,2}$' || {
   567→          echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} item #${z_item_num} has invalid CIDR format: '${z_item}'"
   568→          return 0
   569→        }
   570→      done
   571→      ;;
   572→
   573→    list_domain)
   574→      local z_item
   575→      local z_item_num=0
   576→      for z_item in ${z_val}; do
   577→        z_item_num=$((z_item_num + 1))
   578→        echo "${z_item}" | grep -qE '^[a-zA-Z0-9][a-zA-Z0-9\.-]*[a-zA-Z0-9]$' || {
   579→          echo "${BUV_check_fail}${z_varname} item #${z_item_num} has invalid domain format: '${z_item}'"
   580→          return 0
   581→        }
   582→      done
   583→      ;;
   584→
   585→    *)
   586→      echo "${BUV_check_fail}unknown type: ${z_type}"
   587→      return 0
   588→      ;;
   589→
   590→  esac
   591→}
   592→
   593→# buv_consecration_format VALUE — validate consecration string matches [cbg]YYMMDDHHMMSS-rYYMMDDHHMMSS
   594→# Returns 0 on valid, dies on invalid. Pass empty string to skip (optional fields).
   595→buv_consecration_format() {
   596→  local z_val="${1:-}"
   597→  test -n "${z_val}" || return 0
   598→  echo "${z_val}" | grep -qE '^[cbg][0-9]{12}-r[0-9]{12}$' \
   599→    || buc_die "Invalid consecration format: '${z_val}' (expected [cbg]YYMMDDHHMMSS-rYYMMDDHHMMSS)"
   600→}
   601→
   602→# buv_scope_sentinel SCOPE PREFIX — die if any PREFIX_ vars exist that are not enrolled in SCOPE
   603→# Usage: buv_scope_sentinel RBRN RBRN_
   604→buv_scope_sentinel() {
   605→  zbuv_sentinel
   606→
   607→  local z_scope="${1:-}"
   608→  local z_prefix="${2:-}"
   609→  test -n "${z_scope}"  || buc_die "buv_scope_sentinel: scope required"
   610→  test -n "${z_prefix}" || buc_die "buv_scope_sentinel: prefix required"
   611→
   612→  # Build lookup string from enrolled varnames for this scope
   613→  local z_known=" "
   614→  local z_i
   615→  for z_i in "${!z_buv_scope_roll[@]}"; do
   616→    test "${z_buv_scope_roll[$z_i]}" = "${z_scope}" || continue
   617→    z_known="${z_known}${z_buv_varname_roll[$z_i]} "
   618→  done
   619→
   620→  # Scan environment for unexpected vars with this prefix
   621→  local z_unexpected=()
   622→  local z_var
   623→  for z_var in $(compgen -v "${z_prefix}"); do
   624→    case "${z_known}" in
   625→      *" ${z_var} "*) : ;;
   626→      *) z_unexpected+=("${z_var}") ;;
   627→    esac
   628→  done
   629→
   630→  if test "${#z_unexpected[@]}" -gt 0; then
   631→    buc_die "Unexpected ${z_prefix}* variables not enrolled in ${z_scope}: ${z_unexpected[*]}"
   632→  fi
   633→}
   634→
   635→# buv_docker_env SCOPE ARRAY_VAR — populate ARRAY_VAR with -e VARNAME=val pairs for all enrolled vars in SCOPE
   636→# Usage: buv_docker_env RBRN ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV
   637→buv_docker_env() {
   638→  zbuv_sentinel
   639→
   640→  local z_scope="${1:-}"
   641→  local z_array_var="${2:-}"
   642→  test -n "${z_scope}"     || buc_die "buv_docker_env: scope required"
   643→  test -n "${z_array_var}" || buc_die "buv_docker_env: array variable name required"
   644→  echo "${z_array_var}" | grep -qE '^[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$' \
   645→    || buc_die "buv_docker_env: invalid array variable name: '${z_array_var}'"
   646→
   647→  eval "${z_array_var}=()"
   648→
   649→  local z_i
   650→  for z_i in "${!z_buv_scope_roll[@]}"; do
   651→    test "${z_buv_scope_roll[$z_i]}" = "${z_scope}" || continue
   652→    local z_varname="${z_buv_varname_roll[$z_i]}"
   653→    local z_val="${!z_varname:-}"
   654→    eval "${z_array_var}+=(\"-e\" \"${z_varname}=${z_val}\")"
   655→  done
   656→}
   657→
   658→# buv_vet SCOPE — iterate all enrolled vars in scope; die on first failure
   659→buv_vet() {
   660→  zbuv_sentinel
   661→
   662→  local z_scope="${1:-}"
   663→  test -n "${z_scope}" || buc_die "buv_vet: scope required"
   664→
   665→  local z_i
   666→  local z_err
   667→  for z_i in "${!z_buv_scope_roll[@]}"; do
   668→    test "${z_buv_scope_roll[$z_i]}" = "${z_scope}" || continue
   669→    z_err=$(zbuv_check_capture "${z_i}")
   670→    test -z "${z_err}" || test "${z_err}" = "${BUV_check_gated}" || buc_die "${z_buv_varname_roll[$z_i]}: ${z_err#"${BUV_check_fail}"}"
   671→  done
   672→}
   673→
   674→# buv_lock SCOPE — make all enrolled variables in scope readonly
   675→# Call after enforce succeeds. Prevents downstream mutation of validated config.
   676→buv_lock() {
   677→  zbuv_sentinel
   678→
   679→  local -r z_scope="${1:-}"
   680→  test -n "${z_scope}" || buc_die "buv_lock: scope required"
   681→
   682→  local z_i
   683→  for z_i in "${!z_buv_scope_roll[@]}"; do
   684→    test "${z_buv_scope_roll[$z_i]}" = "${z_scope}" || continue
   685→    readonly "${z_buv_varname_roll[$z_i]}"
   686→  done
   687→}
   688→
   689→# buv_report SCOPE "Label" — rich per-variable display; returns non-zero if any failed
   690→buv_report() {
   691→  zbuv_sentinel
   692→
   693→  local z_scope="${1:-}"
   694→  local z_label="${2:-}"
   695→  test -n "${z_scope}" || buc_die "buv_report: scope required"
   696→  test -n "${z_label}" || buc_die "buv_report: label required"
   697→
   698→  local z_any_failed=0
   699→
   700→  buc_step "${z_label}"
   701→
   702→  local z_i
   703→  for z_i in "${!z_buv_scope_roll[@]}"; do
   704→    test "${z_buv_scope_roll[$z_i]}" = "${z_scope}" || continue
   705→
   706→    local z_varname="${z_buv_varname_roll[$z_i]}"
   707→    local z_type="${z_buv_type_roll[$z_i]}"
   708→    local z_val="${!z_varname:-}"
   709→    local z_err
   710→
   711→    z_err=$(zbuv_check_capture "${z_i}")
   712→    if test -z "${z_err}"; then
   713→      buc_step "  PASS  ${z_varname}=${z_val} [${z_type}]"
   714→    elif test "${z_err}" = "${BUV_check_gated}"; then
   715→      buc_step "  SKIP  ${z_varname} (gated)"
   716→    else
   717→      buc_step "  FAIL  ${z_varname}=${z_val} [${z_type}]: ${z_err#"${BUV_check_fail}"}"
   718→      z_any_failed=1
   719→    fi
   720→  done
   721→
   722→  return "${z_any_failed}"
   723→}
   724→
   725→# zbuv_group_gate_recite SCOPE TITLE — look up group gate from registry
   726→# Sets ZBUV_GRP_GATE_VAR and ZBUV_GRP_GATE_VAL (empty if ungated).
   727→zbuv_group_gate_recite() {
   728→  local z_scope="${1:-}"
   729→  local z_title="${2:-}"
   730→
   731→  ZBUV_GRP_GATE_VAR=""
   732→  ZBUV_GRP_GATE_VAL=""
   733→
   734→  local z_s
   735→  for z_s in "${!z_buv_grp_scope_roll[@]}"; do
   736→    if test "${z_buv_grp_scope_roll[$z_s]}" = "${z_scope}" \
   737→      && test "${z_buv_grp_title_roll[$z_s]}" = "${z_title}"; then
   738→      ZBUV_GRP_GATE_VAR="${z_buv_grp_gate_var_roll[$z_s]}"
   739→      ZBUV_GRP_GATE_VAL="${z_buv_grp_gate_val_roll[$z_s]}"
   740→      return 0
   741→    fi
   742→  done
   743→}
   744→
   745→# zbuv_req_status INDEX — derive req/opt/cond from enrollment data
   746→# Sets ZBUV_REQ_STATUS.
   747→zbuv_req_status() {
   748→  local z_idx="${1:-}"
   749→  local z_gate_var="${z_buv_gate_var_roll[$z_idx]}"
   750→  local z_p1="${z_buv_p1_roll[$z_idx]}"
   751→
   752→  if test -n "${z_gate_var}"; then
   753→    ZBUV_REQ_STATUS="cond"
   754→  elif test "${z_p1}" = "0"; then
   755→    ZBUV_REQ_STATUS="opt"
   756→  else
   757→    ZBUV_REQ_STATUS="req"
   758→  fi
   759→}
   760→
   761→# buv_render SCOPE "Label" — render all enrolled vars via bupr_ presentation
   762→# Walks enrollment rolls grouped by group, applying group-level gates.
   763→# Requires bupr (PresentationRegime) to be kindled.
   764→buv_render() {
   765→  zbuv_sentinel
   766→  zbupr_sentinel
   767→
   768→  local z_scope="${1:-}"
   769→  local z_label="${2:-}"
   770→  test -n "${z_scope}" || buc_die "buv_render: scope required"
   771→  test -n "${z_label}" || buc_die "buv_render: label required"
   772→
   773→  local z_current_group=""
   774→  local z_i
   775→  local z_group=""
   776→  local z_varname=""
   777→  local z_type=""
   778→  local z_desc=""
   779→
   780→  echo ""
   781→  echo "${BUC_white}${z_label}${BUC_reset}"
   782→  echo ""
   783→
   784→  for z_i in "${!z_buv_scope_roll[@]}"; do
   785→    test "${z_buv_scope_roll[$z_i]}" = "${z_scope}" || continue
   786→
   787→    z_group="${z_buv_group_roll[$z_i]}"
   788→    z_varname="${z_buv_varname_roll[$z_i]}"
   789→    z_type="${z_buv_type_roll[$z_i]}"
   790→    z_desc="${z_buv_desc_roll[$z_i]}"
   791→
   792→    # Group transition — close previous, open new
   793→    if test "${z_group}" != "${z_current_group}"; then
   794→      if test -n "${z_current_group}"; then
   795→        bupr_section_end
   796→      fi
   797→      z_current_group="${z_group}"
   798→
   799→      zbuv_group_gate_recite "${z_scope}" "${z_group}"
   800→      if test -n "${ZBUV_GRP_GATE_VAR}"; then
   801→        bupr_section_begin "${z_group}" "${ZBUV_GRP_GATE_VAR}" "${ZBUV_GRP_GATE_VAL}"
   802→      else
   803→        bupr_section_begin "${z_group}"
   804→      fi
   805→    fi
   806→
   807→    zbuv_req_status "${z_i}"
   808→    bupr_section_item "${z_varname}" "${z_type}" "${ZBUV_REQ_STATUS}" "${z_desc}"
   809→  done
   810→
   811→  # Close final group
   812→  if test -n "${z_current_group}"; then
   813→    bupr_section_end
   814→  fi
   815→}
   816→
   817→# eof
   818→

    41→  buv_xname_enroll   RBRN_MONIKER                 2   12  "Unique identifier for Bottle Service"
    42→  buv_string_enroll  RBRN_DESCRIPTION              0  120  "Human-readable description"
    43→  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN_RUNTIME                              "Container runtime: docker or podman" \
    44→                     docker podman
    45→
    46→  buv_group_enroll "Container Image Configuration"
    47→  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN_SENTRY_VESSEL            1  128  "Vessel identifier for Sentry Image"
    48→  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN_BOTTLE_VESSEL            1  128  "Vessel identifier for Bottle Image"
    49→  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN_SENTRY_CONSECRATION      1  128  "Consecration tag for Sentry Image"
    50→  buv_fqin_enroll    RBRN_BOTTLE_CONSECRATION      1  128  "Consecration tag for Bottle Image"
    51→
    52→  buv_group_enroll "Entry Service Configuration"
    53→  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN_ENTRY_MODE                           "Entry functionality: disabled or enabled" \
    54→                     disabled enabled
    55→  buv_gate_enroll    RBRN_ENTRY_MODE  enabled
    56→  buv_port_enroll    RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION               "External port on Transit Network"
    57→  buv_port_enroll    RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE                   "Enclave port between Sentry and Bottle"
    58→
    59→  buv_group_enroll "Enclave Network Configuration"
    60→  buv_ipv4_enroll    RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP                      "Base IPv4 for enclave network"
    61→  buv_decimal_enroll RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK          8   30  "Network mask width (8-30)"
    62→  buv_ipv4_enroll    RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP                    "IP address for Sentry Container"
    63→  buv_ipv4_enroll    RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP                    "IP address for Bottle Container"
    64→
    65→  buv_group_enroll "Uplink Core"
    66→  buv_port_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN                      "Minimum port for outbound connections"
    67→  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE                      "DNS mode: disabled, global, or allowlist" \
    68→                     disabled global allowlist
    69→  buv_enum_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE                   "IP access mode: disabled, global, or allowlist" \
    70→                     disabled global allowlist
    71→
    72→  buv_group_enroll "Uplink DNS Allowlist"
    73→  buv_gate_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_DNS_MODE  allowlist
    74→  buv_list_domain_enroll RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_DOMAINS           "Allowed DNS domains"

    77→  buv_gate_enroll    RBRN_UPLINK_ACCESS_MODE  allowlist
    78→  buv_list_cidr_enroll   RBRN_UPLINK_ALLOWED_CIDRS             "Allowed CIDR ranges"

    81→  buv_string_enroll  RBRN_VOLUME_MOUNTS            0  240  "Volume mount arguments for Bottle"

    88→
    89→  readonly ZRBRN_KINDLED=1
    90→}
    91→
    92→zrbrn_sentinel() {
    93→  test "${ZRBRN_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbrn not kindled - call zrbrn_kindle first"
    94→}
    95→
    96→# Enforce all RBRN enrollment validations and custom format checks
    97→zrbrn_enforce() {
    98→  zrbrn_sentinel
    99→
   100→  buv_vet RBRN
   101→
   102→  # Verify IPs fall within declared subnet
   103→  zrbrn_ip_in_subnet RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}"
   104→  zrbrn_ip_in_subnet RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}" "${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}"
   105→
   106→  # Cross-port check (entry ports must be less than uplink port min)
   107→  if test "${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}" = "enabled"; then
   108→    test "${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION}" -lt "${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN}" || \
   109→      buc_die "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION must be less than RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN"
   110→    test "${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE}" -lt "${RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN}" || \
   111→      buc_die "RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE must be less than RBRN_UPLINK_PORT_MIN"
   112→  fi
   113→
   114→  # Build docker env args array from validated values
   115→  # Usage: docker run "${ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV[@]}" ...
   116→  buv_docker_env RBRN ZRBRN_DOCKER_ENV
   117→}
   118→
   119→######################################################################
   120→# Public Functions (rbrn_*)
   121→
   122→# List available nameplate monikers as space-separated tokens
   123→# Prerequisite: RBCC sourced (needs RBBC_dot_dir, RBCC_rbrn_prefix, RBCC_rbrn_ext)
   124→rbrn_list_capture() {
   125→  zrbcc_sentinel
   126→
   127→  local z_result=""
   128→  local z_files=("${RBBC_dot_dir}/${RBCC_rbrn_prefix}"*"${RBCC_rbrn_ext}")
   129→  local z_i=""
   130→  for z_i in "${!z_files[@]}"; do
   131→    test -f "${z_files[$z_i]}" || continue
   132→    local z_basename="${z_files[$z_i]##*/}"
   133→    local z_moniker="${z_basename#"${RBCC_rbrn_prefix}"}"
   134→    z_moniker="${z_moniker%"${RBCC_rbrn_ext}"}"
   135→    z_result="${z_result}${z_result:+ }${z_moniker}"
   136→  done
   137→  test -n "${z_result}" || return 1
   138→  echo "${z_result}"
   139→}
   140→
   141→######################################################################
   142→# Cross-Nameplate Functions
   143→#
   144→# rbrn_preflight:  Requires RBCC kindled (called from CLI rbrn_audit)
   145→
   146→# Convert dotted-quad IPv4 to integer for subnet arithmetic
   147→zrbrn_ip_to_int() {
   148→  local z_a z_b z_c z_d
   149→  IFS='.' read -r z_a z_b z_c z_d <<< "$1"
   150→  echo $(( (z_a << 24) + (z_b << 16) + (z_c << 8) + z_d ))
   151→}
   152→
   153→# Validate that an IP falls within a subnet (dies if not)
   154→# Usage: zrbrn_ip_in_subnet LABEL IP BASE MASK
   155→zrbrn_ip_in_subnet() {
   156→  local z_label="$1" z_ip="$2" z_base="$3" z_mask="$4"
   157→  local z_ip_int=$(zrbrn_ip_to_int "${z_ip}")
   158→  local z_base_int=$(zrbrn_ip_to_int "${z_base}")
   159→  local z_net_mask=$(( (0xFFFFFFFF << (32 - z_mask)) & 0xFFFFFFFF ))
   160→  if [[ $(( z_ip_int & z_net_mask )) -ne $(( z_base_int & z_net_mask )) ]]; then
   161→    buc_die "${z_label}=${z_ip} is not within subnet ${z_base}/${z_mask}"
   162→  fi
   163→}
   164→
   165→# Cross-nameplate conflict validation (silent on success, dies on conflict)
   166→# Checks: port uniqueness, subnet non-overlap, enclave IP uniqueness
   167→rbrn_preflight() {
   168→  zrbcc_sentinel
   169→
   170→  # Collect structured data from all nameplates via isolation subshells
   171→  local z_nameplate_files=("${RBBC_dot_dir}/${RBCC_rbrn_prefix}"*"${RBCC_rbrn_ext}")
   172→  local z_data_lines=()
   173→  local z_nf_i=""
   174→  for z_nf_i in "${!z_nameplate_files[@]}"; do
   175→    test -f "${z_nameplate_files[$z_nf_i]}" || continue
   176→    local z_line
   177→    z_line=$(
   178→      bash -c '
   179→        source "$1" || exit 1
   180→        echo "${RBRN_MONIKER}|${RBRN_ENTRY_MODE}|${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION:-0}|${RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE:-0}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BASE_IP}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_NETMASK}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_SENTRY_IP}|${RBRN_ENCLAVE_BOTTLE_IP}"
   181→      ' _ "${z_nameplate_files[$z_nf_i]}"
   182→    ) || buc_die "Preflight isolation failed for: ${z_nameplate_files[$z_nf_i]}"
   183→    z_data_lines+=("${z_line}")
   184→  done
   185→
   186→  # Parallel arrays for conflict detection (bash 3.2 compatible)
   187→  local z_ws_port_keys=()
   188→  local z_ws_port_vals=()
   189→  local z_enc_port_keys=()
   190→  local z_enc_port_vals=()
   191→  local z_ip_keys=()
   192→  local z_ip_vals=()
   193→  local z_net_starts=()
   194→  local z_net_ends=()
   195→  local z_net_owners=()
   196→
   197→  local z_mon=""
   198→  local z_entry=""
   199→  local z_ws=""
   200→  local z_enc=""
   201→  local z_base=""
   202→  local z_mask=""
   203→  local z_sentry=""
   204→  local z_bottle=""
   205→  for z_nf_i in "${!z_data_lines[@]}"; do
   206→    IFS='|' read -r z_mon z_entry z_ws z_enc z_base z_mask z_sentry z_bottle <<< "${z_data_lines[$z_nf_i]}" \
   207→      || buc_die "Failed to parse nameplate data line"
   208→    test -n "${z_mon}" || continue
   209→
   210→    # Workstation and enclave port uniqueness (enabled entries only)
   211→    if test "${z_entry}" = "enabled"; then
   212→      local z_i
   213→      for z_i in "${!z_ws_port_keys[@]}"; do
   214→        if test "${z_ws_port_keys[$z_i]}" = "${z_ws}"; then
   215→          buc_die "Port conflict: RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_WORKSTATION=${z_ws} claimed by both ${z_ws_port_vals[$z_i]} and ${z_mon}"
   216→        fi
   217→      done
   218→      z_ws_port_keys+=("${z_ws}")
   219→      z_ws_port_vals+=("${z_mon}")
   220→
   221→      for z_i in "${!z_enc_port_keys[@]}"; do
   222→        if test "${z_enc_port_keys[$z_i]}" = "${z_enc}"; then
   223→          buc_die "Port conflict: RBRN_ENTRY_PORT_ENCLAVE=${z_enc} claimed by both ${z_enc_port_vals[$z_i]} and ${z_mon}"
   224→        fi
   225→      done
   226→      z_enc_port_keys+=("${z_enc}")
   227→      z_enc_port_vals+=("${z_mon}")
   228→    fi
   229→
   230→    # Enclave IP uniqueness (all sentry and bottle IPs across nameplates)
   231→    local z_j
   232→    for z_j in "${!z_ip_keys[@]}"; do
   233→      if test "${z_ip_keys[$z_j]}" = "${z_sentry}"; then
   234→        buc_die "IP conflict: ${z_sentry} claimed by ${z_mon} (sentry) and ${z_ip_vals[$z_j]}"
   235→      fi
   236→    done
   237→    z_ip_keys+=("${z_sentry}")
   238→    z_ip_vals+=("${z_mon}:sentry")
   239→
   240→    for z_j in "${!z_ip_keys[@]}"; do
   241→      if test "${z_ip_keys[$z_j]}" = "${z_bottle}"; then
   242→        buc_die "IP conflict: ${z_bottle} claimed by ${z_mon} (bottle) and ${z_ip_vals[$z_j]}"
   243→      fi
   244→    done
   245→    z_ip_keys+=("${z_bottle}")
   246→    z_ip_vals+=("${z_mon}:bottle")
   247→
   248→    # Subnet non-overlap
   249→    local z_net_int=$(zrbrn_ip_to_int "${z_base}")
   250→    local z_net_mask_bits=$(( (0xFFFFFFFF << (32 - z_mask)) & 0xFFFFFFFF ))
   251→    local z_net_addr=$(( z_net_int & z_net_mask_bits ))
   252→    local z_net_size=$(( 1 << (32 - z_mask) ))
   253→    local z_net_end=$(( z_net_addr + z_net_size - 1 ))
   254→
   255→    local z_k
   256→    for z_k in "${!z_net_starts[@]}"; do
   257→      if [[ ${z_net_addr} -le ${z_net_ends[$z_k]} ]] && [[ ${z_net_starts[$z_k]} -le ${z_net_end} ]]; then
   258→        buc_die "Subnet overlap: ${z_base}/${z_mask} (${z_mon}) overlaps with network of ${z_net_owners[$z_k]}"
   259→      fi
   260→    done
   261→    z_net_starts+=("${z_net_addr}")
   262→    z_net_ends+=("${z_net_end}")
   263→    z_net_owners+=("${z_mon}")
   264→
   265→  done
   266→}
   267→
   268→# eof
   269→

    82→######################################################################
    83→# Public Functions (rbrv_*)
    84→
    85→# List available vessel sigils as space-separated tokens
    86→# Prerequisite: RBRR kindled (needs RBRR_VESSEL_DIR)
    87→rbrv_list_capture() {
    88→  zrbrr_sentinel
    89→
    90→  local z_result=""
    91→  local z_dirs=("${RBRR_VESSEL_DIR}"/*)
    92→  local z_i=""
    93→  for z_i in "${!z_dirs[@]}"; do
    94→    local z_d="${z_dirs[$z_i]}"
    95→    test -d "${z_d}" || continue
    96→    test -f "${z_d}/rbrv.env" || continue
    97→    local z_s="${z_d%/}"
    98→    z_result="${z_result}${z_result:+ }${z_s##*/}"
    99→  done
   100→  test -n "${z_result}" || return 1
   101→  echo "${z_result}"
   102→}
